column1: 5pm Advisory update for PTC #4:  No changes to winds or track. The Tropical Storm Watch has been extended North to Levy county. We'll have complete updates on ABC Action News and we will post our thoughts throughout the evening on social media.
Over Apollo Beach a little while ago! Clouds were rotating.

Ya just never know. Wasn't Charlie in 2004 the hurricane headed straight for Pinellas and at the last minute took a right turn to Punta Gorda?? It crossed across the State to Ormond Beach. A lot of people from Pinellas evacuated to the center of the state and ended up getting hit.
yes but much different storm.

I’m not from Florida, but we will be in Destin on Sunday for a week. How’s it looking in that area during that time?

Sunday is when this will get to Florida. Just be prepared for alot if rain. If you will be on the coast, make sure to check out the local weather there. This us mainly Tampa Bay area. Understand the flooding in your area when you arrive.
Same here. Headed to Cape San Blas! Interested to see what the thoughts are for these areas
if the storm turns east you will be fine. If it doesn’t, you need to buy a golf umbrella.
